behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names src/cli/completion-cli.ts, mentions compdef, precmd_functions, the availability check patterns, _root_completion function, case/compadd/_arguments — all items tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior (availability check, deferred registration, cleanup, dedup) without prescribing exact code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept multiple patterns (whence/type/command -v/$+functions) and multiple cleanup approaches (unfunction, unset -f, precmd_functions:#) and dedup approaches (typeset -gaU, [(r)]).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Node.js to extract the template, and run pnpm lint/format/vitest/tsgo subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub can't pass all the combined assertions requiring availability check, precmd_functions append, cleanup, and dedup in the generated script.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 5 behavioral requirements in the instruction maps to a test (availability check, deferral, cleanup, dedup, _root_completion intact).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_compdef_availability_check, test_precmd_hook_queues_deferred_registration, etc.) with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces shell script text, not structured data.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies the file but not exact line — localization of the bare compdef is still required of the agent.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
